modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with sending Qualtrics emails and receiving responses.

full_description_text:  
- I was trying to send out some Qualtrics surveys to gather feedback, but I noticed something strange.  
- Even though I hit the send button, I haven’t received any responses at all, which is super frustrating!  
- Then I got this weird message saying my weekly email limit was reached, which I didn’t even know was a thing.  
- It said I have to wait until the limit resets, and I’m just sitting here wondering when that will be and if I should contact someone in my organization about it.
short_description: Issues with sending Qualtrics emails and receiving responses.
